## Accepted structured facts

- **datasets:** KITTI Odometry, KITTI-360, Apollo-SouthBay, Ford Campus, MulRan — `source_fact`; manual, p. 10–13, § Abstract;III-IV. LCR-Net;V-VI. System and Evaluation, Fig. 2-9;Table I-VI
- **input_unit:** pair of single raw LiDAR scans, candidate retrieval embeds the incoming scan and map scans separately — `source_fact`; manual, p. 4–9, § Abstract;III-IV. LCR-Net;V-VI. System and Evaluation, Fig. 2-9;Table I-VI
- **invariances:** translation-invariant relative-position attention and keypoint features when the learned rotary mapping is linear, no proven global rotation or full-descriptor translation invariance — `researcher_judgement`; manual, p. 5–6, § Abstract;III-IV. LCR-Net;V-VI. System and Evaluation, Fig. 2-9;Table I-VI
- **representation:** KPEncoder keypoints, 3D-RoFormer++ pose-aware attention, VoteEncoder salient keypoints, NetVLAD with context gating for a 256-D global descriptor, sparse-to-dense optimal-transport point matching, RANSAC or local-to-global registration for 6-DoF pose, A-LOAM integration — `source_fact`; manual, p. 4–9, § Abstract;III-IV. LCR-Net;V-VI. System and Evaluation, Fig. 2-9;Table I-VI
- **uses_learning:** yes — `source_fact`; manual, p. 1–16, § Abstract;III-IV. LCR-Net;V-VI. System and Evaluation, Fig. 2-9;Table I-VI
- **uses_sequence:** no — `researcher_judgement`; manual, p. 1–16, § Abstract;III-IV. LCR-Net;V-VI. System and Evaluation, Fig. 2-9;Table I-VI
